label: Field Research
description: Primary data collected through surveys, interviews, or direct observation of market participants.

label: Expert Panel Assessment
description: Qualitative assessment based on expert panel discussion and professional judgment.

label: Third-Party Report
description: Finding sourced from an independent third-party report or white paper.

label: Vendor Confirmed
description: Information confirmed directly by the vendor's own team.

label: Historical Record
description: Outcome verified through historical public records, acquisitions, product launches, or market events.

label: Market Research
description: Observation derived from primary or secondary market research data.

label: Strategic Assessment
description: Qualitative evaluation of a strategic position, capability, or initiative.

label: Strategic Recommendation
description: Advisory recommendation for a specific strategic action.

label: Competitive Assessment
description: Evaluation of a competitor's position, capabilities, or strategy.

label: Viability Prediction
description: Forward-looking prediction about the viability, timeline, or outcome of a technology or strategy.

label: Actual Outcome
description: Verified historical outcome that can be compared against predictions or assessments made in the study.

label: Gap Analysis
description: Identification of a gap in capabilities, products, or market coverage.

label: Market Scope
description: Definition of market boundaries, segments, channels, or verticals.

label: Partnership Assessment
description: Evaluation of the importance or status of a vendor partnership or alliance.

label: Contextual
description: Background contextual information relevant to understanding other observations.

label: Advisory Report
description: Strategic advisory report produced from vendor briefings and market analysis.

label: Active
description: Entity is currently active and operating.

label: Acquired
description: Entity was acquired by another organization.

label: Split
description: Entity was split into two or more successor organizations.

label: Defunct
description: Entity is no longer operating and has no direct successor.

label: Unknown
description: Current status of the entity is unknown.

label: Production
description: Technology is in active production use.

label: Emerging
description: Technology is emerging and gaining adoption.

label: Mainstream
description: Technology has achieved mainstream adoption.

label: Legacy Supported
description: Technology is still supported but declining in adoption.

label: Obsolete
description: Technology is obsolete and no longer in common use.

label: Niche Production
description: Technology is in production but serving a niche market segment.

label: Evolved
description: Technology evolved significantly into successor technologies.

label: Active Concept
description: Conceptual framework or metric that remains actively used.

label: Expert Opinion
description: Qualitative professional judgment from a domain practitioner

label: Framework Factor
description: A criterion or dimension in an analyst's evaluative framework

label: Market Data
description: Quantitative or qualitative market size, growth, or segment statistic

label: Strategy Classification
description: Characterizes strategic positioning or market stance of a vendor or technology
